title: ReleaseReceipt

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

releaseTarget.description: Identifier of the release target (e.g., container image tag, dataset version URN).

sourceRef.description: Optional URN of the source artifact or branch used for this release.

artifactHashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of the release artifacts in 'sha256:<hex>' format.

checks.description: Names of validation checks that were run (e.g., 'schema-lint', 'security-scan').

description: A verification record confirming that a release target has been validated, capturing artifact hashes, the results of all quality and security checks, and the overall verification status.
